$schema-note: Manifest of every managed Intent Eval Platform repo. Hand-authored; the cross-repo source of truth for which repos are wired with ecosystem-sync automation and the schema/harness versions each pins. Read ecosystem/README.md and the sibling coherence-check.sh.
notes: kind values: kernel | methodology | gates | behavioral-eval | action.
core_schema_version = the @intentsolutions/core version the repo pins (the canonical contracts kernel + JSON Schemas). 'self' means the repo IS the kernel; null means no direct dependency.

audit_harness_version = the @intentsolutions/audit-harness version the repo pins, whether as an npm devDependency or a vendored .audit-harness/ install. For the harness repo itself (harness_install=self) this is the repo's own published package version.
harness_install = npm-dep (devDependency in package.json) | vendored (.audit-harness/ + scripts/audit-harness wrapper) | self.

Pinned versions captured 2026-06-13 from each repo's package.json / vendored .audit-harness/VERSION. Update this file whenever a repo bumps either pin; coherence-check.sh fails when a repo drifts from these values.

deferred.reason: claude-code-plugins has bespoke in-flight CI/CD that tests plugins. It is NOT wired with any ecosystem-sync automation. Study and coordinate with its existing CI before touching it; never bolt generic automation on. Listed here only so the deferral is explicit, not so it is managed.
